resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  AVG(g.exam_score) AS average_exam_score
FROM public.grades g
JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.name ASC;

issues: All encoded fields (course_name, course_code, average_exam_score) are present in metadata — good.
Minor presentation note: long course_name labels may overlap despite labelAngle; consider using course_code or increasing chart width if many courses.
Minor caution: the SQL returns pre-aggregated average_exam_score; ensure the visualization uses these values as-is (no additional aggregation in the Vega-Lite spec).

result.sql:
SELECT
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  AVG(g.exam_score) AS average_exam_score
FROM public.grades g
JOIN public.enrollments e ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
JOIN public.course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
JOIN public.courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
WHERE g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.name ASC;
